title: U3 Account / Auth Signals
description: 🟡 PROVISIONAL (events.md §3 — shapes finalized in U3 FD; here only the fact-of-publish, producer/consumer, meaning, and security invariants are fixed). U3 SignupService/AuthenticationService emit these after domain processing (services.md). Contains: AccountCreated, SignupAbuseSignal, AuthFailureSignal. All payloads: NO plaintext passwords/credentials (FR-7/SEC-12 invariant), PII minimized (SEC-3), generalized failure reasons (SEC-12). Use $defs root selection to validate a specific shape.

AccountCreated.title: AccountCreated
AccountCreated.description: Producer: U3.SignupService — published after policy/uniqueness validation, hashing, and persistence succeed (services.md register orchestration). Consumer: U6 Observability/Ops (signup telemetry + audit fan-out). Delivery: at-least-once → consumer idempotent (suppress duplicate signup telemetry). PII minimized (SEC-3); plaintext password/credentials NEVER included (FR-7/SEC-12 invariant). Trace: FR-7, US-A1, NFR-O1.

userId.description: Identifier of the newly created account (no credentials; PII-minimized — SEC-3). Trace: events.md §3.1, FR-7.

timestamp.description: Account creation time (date-time; concrete wire format is Infra Design). Trace: events.md §3.1.

SignupAbuseSignal.title: SignupAbuseSignal
SignupAbuseSignal.description: Producer: U3.SignupService — emitted on abuse indications (rate/duplicate, etc.). Consumer: U6 Ops (signup-abuse mitigation, coupled with gateway rate-limiting SEC-11). Delivery: at-least-once → consumer idempotent (duplicate-signal safe). NO secrets/PII exposed (SEC-3); reason generalized. Trace: SEC-11, RES-11.

timestamp.description: Time the abuse indication was observed (date-time). Trace: events.md §3.2.

reason.description: Generalized abuse-indication category (e.g. rate/duplicate — non-sensitive label; no PII/secrets, SEC-3). Trace: events.md §3.2, SEC-11.

AuthFailureSignal.title: AuthFailureSignal
AuthFailureSignal.description: Producer: U3.AuthenticationService — emitted on credential-verification failure (preserving the 'do not reveal credential existence' invariant). Consumer: U6 Ops (brute-force detection → lockout/delay/CAPTCHA enforcement + alerting). Delivery: at-least-once → consumer idempotent. Failure reason GENERALIZED — MUST NOT reveal which credential was wrong, and MUST NOT carry plaintext credentials (SEC-12). Trace: SEC-12, RES-11.

timestamp.description: Time of the authentication-failure event (date-time). Trace: events.md §3.3.

reason.description: Generalized failure reason — does NOT reveal which credential was wrong; no plaintext credentials (SEC-12). Trace: events.md §3.3, SEC-12.
